	Return 
// 0x2213: ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.bigStruct>]

	Return 
// 0x221f: ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]

	Return 
// 0x222b: ProcessType[main.condFields]
	IncrementOutputOffset 38 00 00 00 
	Call 08 24 00 00 // ProcessType[string]
	Return 
// 0x2236: ProcessType[main.lenFields]

// 0x2270: ProcessType[map<string,int>]
